2606.10445.title: SpenseGPT: Practical One-shot Pruning Enabling Sparse and Dense GEMMs for LLM Inference
2606.10445.paper_summary: Semi-structured 2:4 sparsity is widely supported by modern accelerators, providing up to a 2x theoretical speedup. However, its strict 50% sparsity constraint often causes non-negligible accuracy degradation under post-training pruning. Meanwhile, existing relaxed sparsity formats either require specialized compiler support or introduce runtime overheads that limit end-to-end speedup. We propose Spense, a practical hybrid sparse-dense format that splits each weight matrix into a 2:4 sparse region and a dense region. This design relaxes the effective sparsity constraint while remaining compatible with existing high-performance sparse and dense GEMM libraries, avoiding both custom compiler support and input activation expansion. Building on this format, we introduce SpenseGPT, a one-shot post-training pruning method that produces sparse and dense regions. Notably, we show that selecting the right dense regions is important, and we devise two different strategies to choose them. Experiments on Qwen3-32B and Seed-OSS-36B demonstrate that our method achieves up to 1.2x end-to-end decoding speedup on B200 GPUs with FP8 precision, while preserving accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first one-shot pruning demonstration of real-world end-to-end LLM decoding speedup from semi-structured sparse tensor cores on recent GPUs such as B200s, while maintaining model quality.
2606.10445.paper_summary_zh: 半結構化的 2:4 稀疏性在現代加速器中得到了廣泛支持，提供高達 2 倍的理論加速。然而，其嚴格的 50% 稀疏性限制常常導致在訓練後修剪過程中出現不可忽視的準確性下降。與此同時，現有的放寬稀疏性格式要麼需要專門的編譯器支持，要麼引入運行時開銷，限制了端到端的加速。我們提出了 Spense，一種實用的混合稀疏-密集格式，將每個權重矩陣分割為 2:4 的稀疏區域和密集區域。這種設計放寬了有效的稀疏性限制，同時仍然與現有的高性能稀疏和密集 GEMM 庫兼容，避免了自定義編譯器支持和輸入激活擴展。在此格式的基礎上，我們引入了 SpenseGPT，一種一次性訓練後修剪方法，產生稀疏和密集區域。值得注意的是，我們顯示選擇正確的密集區域是重要的，並設計了兩種不同的策略來選擇它們。在 Qwen3-32B 和 Seed-OSS-36B 上的實驗表明，我們的方法在 B200 GPU 上以 FP8 精度實現了高達 1.2 倍的端到端解碼加速，同時保持了準確性。據我們所知，這是首次在最近的 GPU（如 B200s）上展示的來自半結構化稀疏張量核心的真實世界端到端 LLM 解碼加速的一次性修剪示範，同時保持模型質量。
2606.10445.author: Jaeseong Lee et.al.
2606.10445.authors: Jaeseong Lee, Seung-won Hwang, Samyam Rajbhandari
